case_title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT COPR vs. MCMILLIAN, SANDRA et al

docket_entries.description: MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT COPR COURT TRIAL SET FOR NOV-23-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT COPR AS TO DEFENDANT MCMILLIAN, SANDRA MCMILLIAN, MARK DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED

J.DESMOND, JDG; P.DOWLING-TUCKETT, CSR; G.ESPINOCILLA,CLERK. 9:35 AM CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. ALL PRESENT EXCEPT SANDRA MCMILLIAN. JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION READ INTO THE RECORD: RESTITUTION & POSSESSION OF PREMISES AT 398 HAIGHT ST. #4, SF; $2636.22 RENTS & DAMAGES; $110.00 COSTS; $250.00 ATTY FEES; LEASE FORFEITED; STAY TO 5:01 PM 12/2/93. IF DEFT PAY $800.00 BY 5PM 12/2/93, WRIT SHALL BE RECALLED. DEFT SHALL PAY $400 EVERY 2 WEEKS STARTING 12/16/93. IF DEFT FAILT TO PAY WITHIN 24 HOURS OF DUE DATE, WRIT SHALL BE ISSUED. ALL PAYMENTS SHALL BE A CASHIER'S CHECK OR MONEY ORDER. PLTF ATTY TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCMILLIAN, SANDRA MCMILLIAN, MARK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 398 HAIGHT ST. #4 $2,636.22 RENT, $250.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,996.22, LEASE FORFEITED
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT MCMILLIAN, MARK
DECLARATION OF JACQUELINE Y. WOODS RE: NOTICE TO DEFTS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT COPR
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT MCMILLIAN, MARK ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
